tactic: X shifted to smaller account boost in 2026 - deliberate algorithm change to surface content from smaller accounts vs. established ones. Premium accounts get 4x visibility boost in-network + 2x out-of-network. Two-tier system: Premium essential for reach + monetization (only Premium user engagement counts toward ad revenue). Q1 2026 testing: Premium accounts get 30-40% higher reply impressions.
extracted_method: Smaller accounts now have algorithmic advantage. Premium subscription ($8/mo) = 4x in-network reach + 2x out-of-network + counts toward monetization. Non-Premium engagement doesn't count for payouts.
compliance_notes: Platform officially confirmed. Premium = gateway to monetization.
reviewer_notes: MAJOR SHIFT: Small account advantage + Premium paywall for monetization. Verified Feb 2026 multiple sources. X Money wallet rolling out 2026 (Visa-backed). Engagement from Premium users ONLY counts for ad revenue.

tactic: TikTok Jan 2026 algorithm update: watch time weighted 30% heavier. Content watched 30+ seconds gets preference. 60-90 second videos favored over quick-cut. Engagement rate > views (1K views 50 comments = 5% beats 10K views 100 comments = 1%). Follower-first distribution: new videos shown to existing followers first few days before wider push.
extracted_method: Watch time is king. 60-90s content + 30+ second retention = algorithm preference. Engagement rate matters more than view count. Test with followers first.
compliance_notes: Jan 2026 algorithm change confirmed. Shift to longer-form + watch time.
reviewer_notes: MAJOR CHANGE: 30% heavier watch time weighting Jan 2026. 60-90s optimal vs. quick cuts. Follower-first testing means existing audience critical. Creator Fund dead → Creator Rewards Program (requires 100K views + 300K watch-hours/30d).

tactic: TikTok Creator Fund DEAD (replaced by Creator Rewards Program). New requirements: 100K views + 300K watch-hours in 30 days for full-rate payment (vs. old view-count-only model). Educational content +18% in recommendations. Niche communities 1K-50K members getting algorithm boost. Precision > popularity.
extracted_method: Creator Fund dead. New: Creator Rewards Program with higher bar (300K watch-hours). Educational content rising (+18%). Niche communities 1K-50K getting boost. Build precision audiences not mass appeal.
compliance_notes: Official TikTok program change. Verified requirements.
reviewer_notes: MONETIZATION SHIFT: Old Creator Fund gone. New bar much higher (300K watch-hours). Educational +18% recommendations. Niche communities (1-50K) algorithmically boosted. Strategy: precision niche content over viral chasing.

tactic: Instagram launched 'Your Algorithm' Dec 10 2025 (US only, expanding 2026) - users can view + customize topics Instagram thinks they're interested in. Major shift: follower-based 'social graph' → interest-based recommendation for Reels. 53% of all IG ads ran on Reels in Q4 2025 (up from 35% in 2024). Zuckerberg: Reels hit $50B annual run rate but 'monetization efficiency much less than Feed'.
extracted_method: Instagram shifted to interest-based vs. follower-based for Reels. 'Your Algorithm' tool lets users customize. 53% of ads on Reels (up from 35%). BUT: Reels less profitable than Feed per Zuckerberg. Volume matters.
compliance_notes: Official Meta data. Q4 2025 ad stats confirmed.
reviewer_notes: ALGO TRANSPARENCY: 'Your Algorithm' feature (Dec 2025) = users can see + edit interests. Interest-based > follower-based. 53% of ads on Reels BUT lower monetization efficiency than Feed. Volume strategy needed for creators.

tactic: YouTube Shorts monetization 2026: Standard tier = 1K subs + 4K watch-hours (or 10M Shorts views/90d). Basic tier = 500 subs + 3K hours (or 3M Shorts) for Memberships/Super Chat (NO ad revenue). Shorts RPM $0.01-$0.07/1K views ($0.03 avg = 3.3M views for $100). 50-60s Shorts perform best (76% watch-through rate). Pooled revenue model (not individual ad placements).
extracted_method: Shorts pay $0.01-$0.07/1K ($50-500 per million views). 50-60s = best performance (76% completion). Use Shorts for discovery → funnel to long-form for real revenue. Pooled model = volume strategy.
compliance_notes: Official YouTube 2026 requirements confirmed.
reviewer_notes: LOW RPM: $0.01-$0.07/1K views vs. long-form. 50-60s optimal (76% completion). Strategy: Shorts = audience growth, long-form = monetization. Pooled revenue model means volume matters. Basic tier (500 subs) unlocks memberships but NOT ads.

tactic: Facebook Reels Play Bonus Program ENDED Aug 31 2025. Replaced by Content Monetization Program (CMP) - unified beta merging In-Stream Ads + Ads on Reels + Performance Bonus. Original program paid up to $35K/mo, recent invites capped at $1.2K/mo before shutdown. CMP = ad revenue-sharing model (no direct view-based bonuses). Alternative: Stars, fan subscriptions, brand collabs, affiliate.
extracted_method: Reels Play Bonus dead (Aug 2025). New: Content Monetization Program (ad rev-share, no view bonuses). Focus on Stars (virtual gifts), fan subs, brand deals, affiliate. Direct view payments gone.
compliance_notes: Official Meta program end date. Verified Aug 31 2025.
reviewer_notes: MAJOR CHANGE: Reels Play Bonus ended Aug 31 2025 (was $35K/mo cap → $1.2K before death). CMP = ad revenue-sharing only. Shift strategy to Stars, fan subscriptions, brand collabs, affiliate vs. chasing views.

tactic: LinkedIn organic reach CRASHED 2024-2026: views -50%, engagement -25%, follower growth -59% (Richard van der Blom research). Average post reach 8-12% of followers (was 15-20%). Company pages -60% reach. Personal profiles get 13x more reach than company pages. Dwell Time = #1 metric (not Likes). First 90 minutes determine reach. Creator Mode helps (follower distribution vs. connection-only).
extracted_method: LinkedIn organic TANKED (-50% views, -25% engagement, -60% company pages). Personal profiles 13x company pages. Dwell time > likes. First 90 min critical. Post 3-5x/week consistent topics. Use Creator Mode for follower distribution.
compliance_notes: Richard van der Blom research verified. Official LinkedIn metrics.
reviewer_notes: ORGANIC CRASH: Views -50%, engagement -25%, follower growth -59% (2024-2026). Company pages dead (-60%). Personal profiles 13x better. Dwell time = king metric. First 90 min post determines reach. Creator Mode = follower distribution (choose 5 niche hashtags). Quality > frequency.

tactic: New York S.8420-A effective June 9 2026: mandatory disclosure of 'synthetic performers' in advertising. AI-generated or AI-altered human likenesses must be clearly disclosed. Applies to advertisements distributed in NY. Penalties: $1K first offense, $5K subsequent. 'Conspicuous' disclosure required.
extracted_method: NY law June 9 2026: AI-generated/altered humans in ads = conspicuous disclosure required. $1K/$5K penalties. Applies to content distributed in NY (nationwide reach = compliance needed). Label synthetic performers clearly.
compliance_notes: NY S.8420-A official law. June 9 2026 effective.
reviewer_notes: NY LAW JUNE 2026: Synthetic performer disclosure mandatory in ads (AI-generated/altered humans). Conspicuous label required. $1K first offense, $5K subsequent. Nationwide creators = comply (if NY distribution). Clear labeling = non-negotiable.

tactic: EU AI Act Article 50: Aug 2 2026 = all companies must label AI-generated audio, images, video, text in machine-readable format. Transparency obligations for AI systems. Applies to content created by AI (whether texts, images, audios, videos). Major compliance deadline for EU distribution.
cross_sell_products: AI content → EU distribution → Mandatory labels
extracted_method: EU AI Act Aug 2 2026: All AI content (text, image, audio, video) = machine-readable labels mandatory. Applies to companies distributing in EU. Article 50 transparency obligations. Non-compliance = fines + account bans.
compliance_notes: EU AI Act official. Article 50 Aug 2 2026 deadline.
reviewer_notes: EU COMPLIANCE: Aug 2 2026 = AI-generated content labels mandatory (machine-readable format). All media types (text, image, audio, video). Companies distributing in EU = compliance required. Article 50 transparency. Label everything.
